ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Contract Signed for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Contract Signed") && (ISNULL(Contract_Customer_Signed_Date__c )|| ISNULL(Actual_Start_Date__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Contract Signed Date and Actual Start Date.
